name: D-Chiro Inositol
summary: May improve insulin sensitivity and ovulation; limited evidence.
description: D-chiro-inositol is linked to insulin signaling and ovulatory function; mechanistic rationale centers on insulin second-messenger pathways, with limited clinical confirmation.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v10.0: Keep lower than myo-inositol; ratio/dose context matters.
claimMap.notes: v10.0: Keep lower than myo-inositol; ratio/dose context matters.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: D-chiro-inositol is often combined with myo-inositol; 40:1 myo:DCI ratio is commonly marketed but product-specific evidence matters

sources.title: PubMed PMID 29498933. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.citation: PubMed PMID 29498933. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.note: evidence citation lookup; PMID source present in Evidence_Register
